summary: The changed profile lookup introduces one supported security finding.

findings.title: Raw user id is interpolated into SQL
findings.body: The changed code reads a request parameter and interpolates it directly into a SQL string before executing it. A crafted id value can change the query semantics.

evidence.summary: Line 6 builds the SQL query with an f-string that includes user_id from the request parameter added on line 5.

findings.suggestedFix: Use a parameterized query or repository helper that binds user_id as a value instead of interpolating it into SQL.

findings.title: Raw user id is interpolated into SQL
findings.body: Duplicate of the same SQL injection issue.

evidence.summary: The changed hunk shows the query string is built using the user-controlled id value.

findings.title: Authentication check is missing in an unrelated file
findings.body: The auth module should verify the user before profile access.

evidence.summary: The unrelated file might need an authentication check.
